case_title: HERNANDEZ, MIGUEL ANGEL VS CHU, WINNE C. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, MIGUEL ANGEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHU, WINNE C. SHIH, ROBERT NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT. CHU, WINNE C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
